title: croton crocodilorum
intro: Croton crocodilorum, also known as the crocodile croton, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton crocodilorum include reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and providing relief from pain and swelling. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also applied topically as an ointment or cream to treat various health conditions.
